---
title: "About"
format: html
---

# About

I am a genomics and data analysis researcher with training in bioinformatics, statistical analysis, and reproducible workflow design. My work sits at the intersection of biological data, computation, and interpretation.

I am especially interested in roles where technical analysis needs to be both rigorous and understandable, including bioinformatics, applied genomics, and biostatistical analysis. I enjoy building systems that make complex data easier to process, interpret, and communicate clearly.

This portfolio highlights a practical theme that runs across much of my work: turning complex data into reliable, interpretable outputs.

## Links

- [GitHub](https://github.com/paola-arguello)
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/paola-arguello-pascualli-216b82349)
